title: Tesla is not alone: 18 (and a half) other big stocks are headed for their worst year on record
text: In the worst year for stocks since the Great Recession, several big names are headed for their worst year on record with just one trading day left in 2022.

title: Otis Worldwide: Strong Elevation After Q3 Results Should Continue
text: Otis shares have gained 22% since Q3 results but remain 7% lower than a year ago and are at 25.8x EPS and a 1.5% Dividend Yield. Our investment case is broadly on track. Adjusted EPS is expected to grow 3-5% in dollars in 2022, despite macro headwinds.
